title: SuperDec: 3D Scene Decomposition with Superquadric Primitives
title_zh: SuperDec：基于超二次曲面的3D场景分解
abstract: We present SuperDec, an approach for creating compact 3D scene representations via decomposition into superquadric primitives. While most recent methods use geometric primitives to obtain photorealistic 3D reconstructions, we instead leverage them to obtain a compact yet expressive representation. To this end, we design a novel architecture that efficiently decomposes point clouds of arbitrary objects into a compact set of superquadrics. We train our model on ShapeNet and demonstrate its generalization capabilities on object instances from ScanNet++ as well as on full Replica scenes. Finally, we show that our compact superquadric-based representation supports a wide range of downstream applications, including robotic manipulation and controllable visual content generation. Project page: https://super-dec.github.io.
abstract_zh: 我们提出SuperDec，一种通过将场景分解为超二次曲面基元来创建紧凑3D场景表示的方法。尽管最近的大多数方法使用几何基元来获得逼真的3D重建，但我们利用它们来获得紧凑且富有表现力的表示。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的架构，能够高效地将任意物体的点云分解为一组紧凑的超二次曲面。我们在ShapeNet上训练模型，并在ScanNet++的物体实例以及完整的Replica场景上展示了其泛化能力。最后，我们展示了这种基于超二次曲面的紧凑表示支持多种下游应用，包括机器人操作和可控视觉内容生成。项目页面：https://super-dec.github.io。
tldr_zh: 用超二次曲面基元将3D场景分解为紧凑表示，支持机器人操作等应用。
cover_zh: 3D场景还能这样拆？超二次曲面让机器人操作更简单！
